name: meta-planner
description: Single-agent template that writes .agent-loop/templates/dynamic.json from a user prompt. After this run, invoke `agent-loop run --template dynamic ...` to execute the produced DAG.

nodes.user:
Translate the following user request into a complete DAG template file at `.agent-loop/templates/dynamic.json`. Keep it minimal and runnable.

User request: {{input.prompt}}
